description: Phase 1 starter prompts for the fan-out experiment. 24 conversational prompts (8 templates × 1 topic × 3 conversational variants per topic). Run against 3 LLM providers × 3 runs each = 216 total probes. Output captures every sub-query each LLM fires before answering. v3 fully drops the keyword-style 'terse' and 'specific' variants — real users don't type keywords into AI, they type questions. The 24 prompts here all read like what a real user would type into ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini.
prompt_design_principles: All prompts are conversational, first-person or third-person-caretaker, grammar-light, lowercase, no formal punctuation.
Year markers ARE allowed (e.g., '2026') because real users do say 'in 2026' or 'this year' — but no keyword-style 'X cost without insurance 2026'.
3 variants per topic test sub-style sensitivity within conversational mode: first-person urgent (own situation), caretaker (asking about a relative), eligibility/info-seeking (general curiosity).
Phase 2 will add a second topic per template (colonoscopy / Eliquis / Florida MA / etc.) to disentangle template effects from topic effects.

prompts.prompt: i have an MRI scheduled next week how much will it cost without insurance
my dad needs an MRI but doesnt have insurance can you tell me what hes looking at price-wise
im supposed to get an mri tomorrow and im worried about the bill what should i expect to pay
how much will Ozempic cost me per month if my insurance doesnt cover it
my mom needs ozempic and her insurance denied it whats the real cost going to be
im paying cash for ozempic every month is there any way to get it cheaper
im 67 and need a root canal will medicare pay for any of it
my dad has medicare and needs his teeth pulled is that going to be covered
does medicare cover any dental stuff like cleanings or dentures im trying to plan for retirement
how do they figure out income for obamacare im self employed and im confused
i keep seeing magi on my marketplace application what does it actually include
do i count my 401k withdrawals when calculating my income for aca subsidies
im about to turn 26 and get kicked off my parents plan what are my options
my daughter is turning 26 next month and needs her own insurance what do we do
i age out of my parents insurance in a few months whats my cheapest option
im a full-time uber driver with no employer plan how do i get health insurance
i drive for doordash and uber whats the best option for health coverage for someone like me
im a 1099 freelancer with no benefits how do i get covered and can i deduct the cost
im 70 in los angeles and need a medicare advantage plan whats the best option
my mom in california just turned 65 and we need to pick a medicare advantage plan
what medicare advantage plans are good in southern california for someone with diabetes
what is the federal poverty level for 2026 i need to know if i qualify for medicaid
my family of 4 makes 35k a year do we qualify for any health insurance help
im trying to figure out the income limits for marketplace subsidies do i qualify if i make 60k
do i qualify for medicaid in texas this year
prompts.note: State-explicit prompt — tests whether LLM fans out to texas-specific Medicaid sub-queries

prompts.prompt: im a single mom in florida do i qualify for medicaid
ohio medicaid income limit for a family of 4 2026
im in pennsylvania and lost my job whats my best health insurance option
im 67 in missouri what medicare advantage plan should i pick
best aca plans in georgia 2026 for a self employed person
do i qualify for medi-cal in california 2026
prompts.note: Tests whether LLM uses the state-named brand (medi-cal) or normalizes to california medicaid

prompts.prompt: im in arizona and need ahcccs how do i apply
prompts.note: Tests state-named program brand decomposition for ahcccs
